## Context

What part of the system is affected and why a change is needed.

## Proposed approach

The technical direction. Note trade-offs and alternatives.

## Affected packages

- [ ] contracts
- [ ] core
- [ ] server
- [ ] web
- [ ] desktop
- [ ] wiki-mcp

## ADR

- [ ] This decision warrants an ADR in `docs/adr/` (Status / Context / Decision / Consequences)

## Acceptance criteria

How we know it's done.
